subject: The Beaches Beat — Issue #0 (send-pipeline test)
bodyHtml:
The Beaches Beat

This is a test issue that proves our weekly send pipeline works end to end: confirmed subscribers only, one-click unsubscribe, bounce/complaint suppression.

Real local news starts next week. 🏖️
